name: The Last Petition
specialty: Experts in navigating the unpredictable rifts, offering a unique ability to traverse them swiftly and safely.

members.name: Elijah Vorenus
members.note: A scar running down his left cheek, remnant of a close call with a Rift beast

members.name: Zara Thorne
members.note: Known for her keen senses and ability to track targets through the maze-like Undercity

members.name: Thorgrim Stonefist
members.note: Carries a hammer adorned with the sigil of the Wardens of Ash, symbolizing his former affiliation

members.name: Aria Nightshade
members.note: Her cool demeanor and sharp negotiating skills often disarm even the toughest adversaries

visual: Clad in leather and studded armor, they move with a purpose, each bearing a lantern that flickers with an ethereal glow. Their faces are obscured by broad-brimmed hats, a common practice in the Undercity to maintain anonymity.
reputation_note: The Last Petition is a crew of seasoned professionals known for their ability to navigate the Rifts and their unrivaled survivability in the dangerous Undercity.
